response.step_by_step_log: The video opens with a performance of "Identity". The title "Identity" is visible in the top left corner. A web search confirmed the song is by Kanaria. I searched for "Identity Kanaria Japanese and English lyrics" to get the lyrics. The rest of the video is a dialogue-heavy birthday segment without vocal music.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual performance by Ouro Kronii singing "Identity" (originally by Kanaria), followed by a birthday celebration segment involving a guest character, "Wata-mama".

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii performs the song "Identity" on a virtual stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あ、ちょっと君に伝えたい
何かがあったような
奇っ怪逆様の踊るベール
逆さまだと知って
魅惑のプログラム恋とは
ただ差し詰めここから行き着くは
愛、アイデンティティ
それは希望のアイデンティティ
アイデンティティ
唸れ君一人のせい
まだ捨てないで待って
それは一つ二つのデスティニー
すぐさまハッピー
落ちる流れ星と
歪なあの星...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah, wait a moment
There's something I want to tell you
There's something going on
That bizarrely inversed dancing veil is upside down, don't you know?
Fascinating program, love is...
Just wait, from here on, what I arrive at is
Love, identity
That is the identity of hope
Identity
Groan, it's all your fault, your fault alone
Wait, please don't just throw it away yet
Somewhere out there is a one-two destiny
Connected, we are happy, can't you see
Burning, glowing, distorted, this shooting star is falling
That distorted star...
